nodes.name: Cron — 06:30 Europe/Paris
nodes.notes: Timezone is taken from n8n instance setting. Confirm n8n env var GENERIC_TIMEZONE=Europe/Paris on the host.

nodes.name: Fetch RSS + Reddit Sources
nodes.notes: Single Code node fetches all RSS/Reddit feeds. Switch off any feed by removing its row in RSS_FEEDS.

nodes.name: Apify — Twitter (last 24h)
nodes.notes: Apify actor pulls last 24h tweets from watched accounts. Requires APIFY_API_KEY in n8n env. Switch actor name in URL if rate-limited (kaitoeasyapi/twitter-x-data-tweet-scraper-pay-per-result-cheapest is a paid fallback).

nodes.name: Claude — Curate + Write
nodes.notes: Claude Sonnet 4.6 scores items and writes the brief. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required in n8n env. Costs ~$0.02 per issue.

nodes.name: Log Draft to Sheets
nodes.notes: Create a new sheet 'AI NEWS Briefs' with tab 'briefs' and columns: date_iso, issue_number, subject, status, stories_json, html_body.

nodes.name: Send Draft to Manu (v1 gate)
nodes.notes: v1 = sends draft ONLY to Manu for manual review. To flip to v2 auto-send, replace this node with Sheets Read → Loop → Gmail Send (see README).
